title: Pure Silky Filipino Chicken Muffins
description: A Filipino dish featuring chicken muffins with umami flavor, silky texture, and a flambe twist, perfect for meal prep and raw food friendly, made with chicken breast, vegetables, and spices, then baked to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together chicken breast, onion, garlic, mushroom, fish sauce, and soy sauce.
Add egg to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Divide the mixture into 12 equal parts and place each part into a muffin tin.
Bake the muffins for 20 minutes or until cooked through.
While the muffins are baking, prepare the flambe sauce by mixing together fish sauce and soy sauce in a small bowl.
Once the muffins are done, remove them from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Drizzle the flambe sauce over the muffins and serve immediately.
